title: Fear The Storm
description: Fight it, Run from it, FEAR it
body:
List of all of the main mods in this modpack --> 

Cracker's Wither Storm Mod, adds the witherstorm from MC Story Mode -

Embiddium, a Sodium replacement for Neoforge - 

Xaero's Minimap and World Map, adds a minimap to your screen - 

Do A Barrel Role, tweaks the elytra movements slightly, meaning you can quite litterally do a barrel roll now - 

Enchantment Icons, adds icons to know which enchanting book you have - 

Gravestone Mod, adds where you last died and saves your stuff -

ETC...
